title: ROS2 Architecture
description: Nodes, topics, services, actions — the 4 concepts that underpin every ROS2 system.

title: Development Environment
description: ROS2 Humble install on Ubuntu, OR use R2BOT's browser-based ROS2 playground (no install).

title: Topics and Messages
description: Message types, publishers, subscribers, rqt visualisation, and debugging with echo.

title: Services and Actions
description: Request/response vs. streaming. Write a Python service server. Implement drive-to-goal action.

title: Robot Description (URDF)
description: Describe your robot in XML. Joints, links, visualisation in RViz2.

title: TF2 — Coordinate Frames
description: Why frames matter. Broadcasting and listening to transforms. Visualise your TF tree.

title: Navigation Stack — Nav2
description: Nav2 architecture, costmaps, path planners (A*, DWB). Navigate a warehouse in simulation.

title: Perception
description: Camera integration, point cloud processing, YOLOv8 object detection, sensor fusion.

title: Real Hardware
description: Connecting Raspberry Pi to ROS2, GPIO control, troubleshooting latency and tf errors.

title: Capstone Project
description: Autonomous Warehouse Robot: SLAM mapping, 3-waypoint navigation, package detection.
